task_name: B1-3 受控变更：更新 EgoCore Registry
description: 在 EgoCore contracts/registry.json 中添加验证记录条目

S01.command: cat /home/moonlight/Project/Github/MyProject/EgoCore/contracts/registry.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Current contracts: {len(d.get(chr(99)+chr(111)+chr(110)+chr(116)+chr(114)+chr(97)+chr(99)+chr(116)+chr(115),{}))}'); print(json.dumps(d, indent=2)[:500])" > artifacts/tasks/pilot_b13_registry_update/output/s01_current_state.txt

S03.step_name: 执行变更：添加验证记录
S03.command:
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

registry_path = Path("/home/moonlight/Project/Github/MyProject/EgoCore/contracts/registry.json")
output_path = Path("artifacts/tasks/pilot_b13_registry_update/output")

# 读取当前 registry
with open(registry_path) as f:
    registry = json.load(f)

# 记录变更前的契约数量
before_count = len(registry.get("contracts", {}))

# 添加验证记录条目（新增字段，不修改现有契约）
registry["validation_records"] = {
    "b12_identity_verify": {
        "validated_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + "Z",
        "task_id": "pilot_b12_identity_verify",
        "result": "passed",
        "checks": [
            "schema_exists",
            "guard_exists", 
            "import_ok",
            "guard_functional"
        ]
    }
}

# 写回
with open(registry_path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(registry, f, indent=2)

# 输出变更摘要
output_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
with open(output_path / "s03_change_summary.txt", 'w') as f:
    f.write(f"Registry updated successfully\n")
    f.write(f"Contracts: {before_count} (unchanged)\n")
    f.write(f"Added: validation_records section\n")

print("Registry updated")
PYEOF

S04.command: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; r=json.loads(Path('/home/moonlight/Project/Github/MyProject/EgoCore/contracts/registry.json').read_text()); vr=r.get('validation_records',{}); print(f'validation_records exists: {bool(vr)}'); print(f'b12_identity_verify found: {chr(98)+chr(49)+chr(50)+chr(95)+chr(105)+chr(100)+chr(101)+chr(110)+chr(116)+chr(105)+chr(116)+chr(121)+chr(95)+chr(118)+chr(101)+chr(114)+chr(105)+chr(102)+chr(121) in vr}')" > artifacts/tasks/pilot_b13_registry_update/output/s04_validation.txt 2>&1
